  • 目录

    • vant组件库源码

      • vant4.0 正式发布了，跟着学会用 vue3 写一个图片懒加载组件！
        • 分析 vant4 源码，学会了如何开发毫秒级渲染的倒计时组件，真是秒啊
          • 分析 vant4 源码，如何用 vue3 + ts 开发一个瀑布流滚动加载的列表组件？
            • 跟着 vant4 源码学习如何用 vue3 + ts 开发一个 loading 组件
              • vant 4 即将正式发布，支持暗黑主题，那么是如何实现的呢

              • 曾经写的"诗词"

                • 知乎回答：你写过什么自认为惊艳的诗？
                  • 登高望远，夜幕降临

                  若川大约 18 分钟
                  此页内容
                  • Change Log

                  # Change Log

                  # v2.68.0 (2016/01/27)

                  • #2036open in new window Add AWS Signature Version 4 (@simov, @mirkods)
                  • #2022open in new window Convert numeric multipart bodies to string (@simov, @feross)
                  • #2024open in new window Update har-validator dependency for nsp advisory #76 (@TylerDixon)
                  • #2016open in new window Update qs to version 6.0.2 🚀 (@greenkeeperio-bot)
                  • #2007open in new window Use the extend module instead of util._extend (@simov)
                  • #2003open in new window Update browserify to version 13.0.0 🚀 (@greenkeeperio-bot)
                  • #1989open in new window Update buffer-equal to version 1.0.0 🚀 (@greenkeeperio-bot)
                  • #1956open in new window Check form-data content-length value before setting up the header (@jongyoonlee)
                  • #1958open in new window Use IncomingMessage.destroy method (@simov)
                  • #1952open in new window Adds example for Tor proxy (@prometheansacrifice)
                  • #1943open in new window Update eslint to version 1.10.3 🚀 (@simov, @greenkeeperio-bot)
                  • #1924open in new window Update eslint to version 1.10.1 🚀 (@greenkeeperio-bot)
                  • #1915open in new window Remove content-length and transfer-encoding headers from defaultProxyHeaderWhiteList (@yaxia)

                  # v2.67.0 (2015/11/19)

                  • #1913open in new window Update http-signature to version 1.1.0 🚀 (@greenkeeperio-bot)

                  # v2.66.0 (2015/11/18)

                  • #1906open in new window Update README URLs based on HTTP redirects (@ReadmeCritic)
                  • #1905open in new window Convert typed arrays into regular buffers (@simov)
                  • #1902open in new window node-uuid@1.4.7 breaks build 🚨 (@greenkeeperio-bot)
                  • #1894open in new window Fix tunneling after redirection from https (Original: #1881) (@simov, @falms)
                  • #1893open in new window Update eslint to version 1.9.0 🚀 (@greenkeeperio-bot)
                  • #1852open in new window Update eslint to version 1.7.3 🚀 (@simov, @greenkeeperio-bot, @paulomcnally, @michelsalib, @arbaaz, @vladimirich, @LoicMahieu, @JoshWillik, @jzaefferer, @ryanwholey, @djchie, @thisconnect, @mgenereu, @acroca, @Sebmaster, @Bloutiouf)
                  • #1876open in new window Implement loose matching for har mime types (@simov)
                  • #1875open in new window Update bluebird to version 3.0.2 🚀 (@simov, @greenkeeperio-bot)
                  • #1871open in new window Update browserify to version 12.0.1 🚀 (@greenkeeperio-bot)
                  • #1866open in new window Add missing quotes on x-token property in README (@miguelmota)
                  • #1874open in new window Fix typo in README.mdopen in new window (@gswalden)
                  • #1860open in new window Improve referer header tests and docs (@simov)
                  • #1861open in new window Remove redundant call to Stream constructor (@watson)
                  • #1857open in new window Fix Referer header to point to the original host name (@simov)
                  • #1850open in new window Update karma-coverage to version 0.5.3 🚀 (@greenkeeperio-bot)
                  • #1847open in new window Use node's latest version when building (@simov)
                  • #1836open in new window Tunnel: fix wrong property name (@Bloutiouf)
                  • #1820open in new window Set href as request.js uses it (@mgenereu)
                  • #1840open in new window Update http-signature to version 1.0.2 🚀 (@greenkeeperio-bot)
                  • #1845open in new window Update istanbul to version 0.4.0 🚀 (@greenkeeperio-bot)

                  # v2.65.0 (2015/10/11)

                  • #1833open in new window Update aws-sign2 to version 0.6.0 🚀 (@greenkeeperio-bot)
                  • #1811open in new window Enable loose cookie parsing in tough-cookie (@Sebmaster)
                  • #1830open in new window Bring back tilde ranges for all dependencies (@simov)
                  • #1821open in new window Implement support for RFC 2617 MD5-sess algorithm. (@BigDSK)
                  • #1828open in new window Updated qs dependency to 5.2.0 (@acroca)
                  • #1818open in new window Extract readResponseBody method out of onRequestResponse (@pvoisin)
                  • #1819open in new window Run stringify once (@mgenereu)
                  • #1814open in new window Updated har-validator to version 2.0.2 (@greenkeeperio-bot)
                  • #1807open in new window Updated tough-cookie to version 2.1.0 (@greenkeeperio-bot)
                  • #1800open in new window Add caret ranges for devDependencies, except eslint (@simov)
                  • #1799open in new window Updated karma-browserify to version 4.4.0 (@greenkeeperio-bot)
                  • #1797open in new window Updated tape to version 4.2.0 (@greenkeeperio-bot)
                  • #1788open in new window Pinned all dependencies (@greenkeeperio-bot)

                  # v2.64.0 (2015/09/25)

                  • #1787open in new window npm ignore examples, release.shopen in new window and disabled.appveyor.yml (@thisconnect)
                  • #1775open in new window Fix typo in README.mdopen in new window (@djchie)
                  • #1776open in new window Changed word 'conjuction' to read 'conjunction' in README.mdopen in new window (@ryanwholey)
                  • #1785open in new window Revert: Set default application/json content-type when using json option #1772 (@simov)

                  # v2.63.0 (2015/09/21)

                  • #1772open in new window Set default application/json content-type when using json option (@jzaefferer)

                  # v2.62.0 (2015/09/15)

                  • #1768open in new window Add node 4.0 to the list of build targets (@simov)
                  • #1767open in new window Query strings now cooperate with unix sockets (@JoshWillik)
                  • #1750open in new window Revert doc about installation of tough-cookie added in #884 (@LoicMahieu)
                  • #1746open in new window Missed comma in Readme (@vladimirich)
                  • #1743open in new window Fix options not being initialized in defaults method (@simov)

                  # v2.61.0 (2015/08/19)

                  • #1721open in new window Minor fix in README.mdopen in new window (@arbaaz)
                  • #1733open in new window Avoid useless Buffer transformation (@michelsalib)
                  • #1726open in new window Update README.mdopen in new window (@paulomcnally)
                  • #1715open in new window Fix forever option in node > 0.10 #1709 (@calibr)
                  • #1716open in new window Do not create Buffer from Object in setContentLength(iojs v3.0 issue) (@calibr)
                  • #1711open in new window Add ability to detect connect timeouts (@kevinburke)
                  • #1712open in new window Set certificate expiration to August 2, 2018 (@kevinburke)
                  • #1700open in new window debug() when JSON.parse() on a response body fails (@phillipj)

                  # v2.60.0 (2015/07/21)

                  • #1687open in new window Fix caseless bug - content-type not being set for multipart/form-data (@simov, @garymathews)

                  # v2.59.0 (2015/07/20)

                  • #1671open in new window Add tests and docs for using the agent, agentClass, agentOptions and forever options. Forever option defaults to using http(s).Agent in node 0.12+ (@simov)
                  • #1679open in new window Fix - do not remove OAuth param when using OAuth realm (@simov, @jhalickman)
                  • #1668open in new window updated dependencies (@deamme)
                  • #1656open in new window Fix form method (@simov)
                  • #1651open in new window Preserve HEAD method when using followAllRedirects (@simov)
                  • #1652open in new window Update encoding option documentation in README.mdopen in new window (@daniel347x)
                  • #1650open in new window Allow content-type overriding when using the form option (@simov)
                  • #1646open in new window Clarify the nature of setting ca in agentOptions (@jeffcharles)

                  # v2.58.0 (2015/06/16)

                  • #1638open in new window Use the extend module to deep extend in the defaults method (@simov)
                  • #1631open in new window Move tunnel logic into separate module (@simov)
                  • #1634open in new window Fix OAuth query transport_method (@simov)
                  • #1603open in new window Add codecov (@simov)

                  # v2.57.0 (2015/05/31)

                  • #1615open in new window Replace '.client' with '.socket' as the former was deprecated in 2.2.0. (@ChALkeR)

                  # v2.56.0 (2015/05/28)

                  • #1610open in new window Bump module dependencies (@simov)
                  • #1600open in new window Extract the querystring logic into separate module (@simov)
                  • #1607open in new window Re-generate certificates (@simov)
                  • #1599open in new window Move getProxyFromURI logic below the check for Invaild URI (#1595) (@simov)
                  • #1598open in new window Fix the way http verbs are defined in order to please intellisense IDEs (@simov, @flannelJesus)
                  • #1591open in new window A few minor fixes: (@simov)
                  • #1584open in new window Refactor test-default tests (according to comments in #1430) (@simov)
                  • #1585open in new window Fixing documentation regarding TLS options (#1583) (@mainakae)
                  • #1574open in new window Refresh the oauth_nonce on redirect (#1573) (@simov)
                  • #1570open in new window Discovered tests that weren't properly running (@seanstrom)
                  • #1569open in new window Fix pause before response arrives (@kevinoid)
                  • #1558open in new window Emit error instead of throw (@simov)
                  • #1568open in new window Fix stall when piping gzipped response (@kevinoid)
                  • #1560open in new window Update combined-stream (@apechimp)
                  • #1543open in new window Initial support for oauth_body_hash on json payloads (@simov, @aesopwolf)
                  • #1541open in new window Fix coveralls (@simov)
                  • #1540open in new window Fix recursive defaults for convenience methods (@simov)
                  • #1536open in new window More eslint style rules (@froatsnook)
                  • #1533open in new window Adding dependency status bar to README.mdopen in new window (@YasharF)
                  • #1539open in new window ensure the latest version of har-validator is included (@ahmadnassri)
                  • #1516open in new window forever+pool test (@devTristan)

                  # v2.55.0 (2015/04/05)

                  • #1520open in new window Refactor defaults (@simov)
                  • #1525open in new window Delete request headers with undefined value. (@froatsnook)
                  • #1521open in new window Add promise tests (@simov)
                  • #1518open in new window Fix defaults (@simov)
                  • #1515open in new window Allow static invoking of convenience methods (@simov)
                  • #1505open in new window Fix multipart boundary extraction regexp (@simov)
                  • #1510open in new window Fix basic auth form data (@simov)

                  # v2.54.0 (2015/03/24)

                  • #1501open in new window HTTP Archive 1.2 support (@ahmadnassri)
                  • #1486open in new window Add a test for the forever agent (@akshayp)
                  • #1500open in new window Adding handling for no auth method and null bearer (@philberg)
                  • #1498open in new window Add table of contents in readme (@simov)
                  • #1477open in new window Add support for qs options via qsOptions key (@simov)
                  • #1496open in new window Parameters encoded to base 64 should be decoded as UTF-8, not ASCII. (@albanm)
                  • #1494open in new window Update eslint (@froatsnook)
                  • #1474open in new window Require Colon in Basic Auth (@erykwalder)
                  • #1481open in new window Fix baseUrl and redirections. (@burningtree)
                  • #1469open in new window Feature/base url (@froatsnook)
                  • #1459open in new window Add option to time request/response cycle (including rollup of redirects) (@aaron-em)
                  • #1468open in new window Re-enable io.js/node 0.12 build (@simov, @mikeal, @BBB)
                  • #1442open in new window Fixed the issue with strictSSL tests on 0.12 & io.js by explicitly setting a cipher that matches the cert. (@BBB, @nicolasmccurdy, @demohi, @simov, @0x4139)
                  • #1460open in new window localAddress or proxy config is lost when redirecting (@simov, @0x4139)
                  • #1453open in new window Test on Node.js 0.12 and io.js with allowed failures (@nicolasmccurdy, @demohi)
                  • #1426open in new window Fixing tests to pass on io.js and node 0.12 (only test-https.js stiff failing) (@mikeal)
                  • #1446open in new window Missing HTTP referer header with redirects Fixes #1038 (@simov, @guimonz)
                  • #1428open in new window Deprecate Node v0.8.x (@nylen)
                  • #1436open in new window Add ability to set a requester without setting default options (@tikotzky)
                  • #1435open in new window dry up verb methods (@sethpollack)
                  • #1423open in new window Allow fully qualified multipart content-type header (@simov)
                  • #1430open in new window Fix recursive requester (@tikotzky)
                  • #1429open in new window Throw error when making HEAD request with a body (@tikotzky)
                  • #1419open in new window Add note that the project is broken in 0.12.x (@nylen)
                  • #1413open in new window Fix basic auth (@simov)
                  • #1397open in new window Improve pipe-from-file tests (@nylen)

                  # v2.53.0 (2015/02/02)

                  • #1396open in new window Do not rfc3986 escape JSON bodies (@nylen, @simov)
                  • #1392open in new window Improve timeout option description (@watson)

                  # v2.52.0 (2015/02/02)

                  • #1383open in new window Add missing HTTPS options that were not being passed to tunnel (@brichard19) (@nylen)
                  • #1388open in new window Upgrade mime-types package version (@roderickhsiao)
                  • #1389open in new window Revise Setup Tunnel Function (@seanstrom)
                  • #1374open in new window Allow explicitly disabling tunneling for proxied https destinations (@nylen)
                  • #1376open in new window Use karma-browserify for tests. Add browser test coverage reporter. (@eiriksm)
                  • #1366open in new window Refactor OAuth into separate module (@simov)
                  • #1373open in new window Rewrite tunnel test to be pure Node.js (@nylen)
                  • #1371open in new window Upgrade test reporter (@nylen)
                  • #1360open in new window Refactor basic, bearer, digest auth logic into separate class (@simov)
                  • #1354open in new window Remove circular dependency from debugging code (@nylen)
                  • #1351open in new window Move digest auth into private prototype method (@simov)
                  • #1352open in new window Update hawk dependency to ~2.3.0 (@mridgway)
                  • #1353open in new window Correct travis-ci badge (@dogancelik)
                  • #1349open in new window Make sure we return on errored browser requests. (@eiriksm)
                  • #1346open in new window getProxyFromURI Extraction Refactor (@seanstrom)
                  • #1337open in new window Standardize test ports on 6767 (@nylen)
                  • #1341open in new window Emit FormData error events as Request error events (@nylen, @rwky)
                  • #1343open in new window Clean up readme badges, and add Travis and Coveralls badges (@nylen)
                  • #1345open in new window Update README.mdopen in new window (@Aaron-Hartwig)
                  • #1338open in new window Always wait for server.close() callback in tests (@nylen)
                  • #1342open in new window Add mock https server and redo start of browser tests for this purpose. (@eiriksm)
                  • #1339open in new window Improve auth docs (@nylen)
                  • #1335open in new window Add support for OAuth plaintext signature method (@simov)
                  • #1332open in new window Add clean script to remove test-browser.js after the tests run (@seanstrom)
                  • #1327open in new window Fix errors generating coverage reports. (@nylen)
                  • #1330open in new window Return empty buffer upon empty response body and encoding is set to null (@seanstrom)
                  • #1326open in new window Use faster container-based infrastructure on Travis (@nylen)
                  • #1315open in new window Implement rfc3986 option (@simov, @nylen, @apoco, @DullReferenceException, @mmalecki, @oliamb, @cliffcrosland, @LewisJEllis, @eiriksm, @poislagarde)
                  • #1314open in new window Detect urlencoded form data header via regex (@simov)
                  • #1317open in new window Improve OAuth1.0 server side flow example (@simov)

                  # v2.51.0 (2014/12/10)

                  • #1310open in new window Revert changes introduced in https://github.com/request/request/pull/1282open in new window (@simov)

                  # v2.50.0 (2014/12/09)

                  • #1308open in new window Add browser test to keep track of browserify compability. (@eiriksm)
                  • #1299open in new window Add optional support for jsonReviver (@poislagarde)
                  • #1277open in new window Add Coveralls configuration (@simov)
                  • #1307open in new window Upgrade form-data, add back browserify compability. Fixes #455. (@eiriksm)
                  • #1305open in new window Fix typo in README.mdopen in new window (@LewisJEllis)
                  • #1288open in new window Update README.mdopen in new window to explain custom file use case (@cliffcrosland)

                  # v2.49.0 (2014/11/28)

                  • #1295open in new window fix(proxy): no-proxy false positive (@oliamb)
                  • #1292open in new window Upgrade caseless to 0.8.1 (@mmalecki)
                  • #1276open in new window Set transfer encoding for multipart/related to chunked by default (@simov)
                  • #1275open in new window Fix multipart content-type headers detection (@simov)
                  • #1269open in new window adds streams example for review (@tbuchok)
                  • #1238open in new window Add examples README.mdopen in new window (@simov)

                  # v2.48.0 (2014/11/12)

                  • #1263open in new window Fixed a syntax error / typo in README.mdopen in new window (@xna2)
                  • #1253open in new window Add multipart chunked flag (@simov, @nylen)
                  • #1251open in new window Clarify that defaults() does not modify global defaults (@nylen)
                  • #1250open in new window Improve documentation for pool and maxSockets options (@nylen)
                  • #1237open in new window Documenting error handling when using streams (@vmattos)
                  • #1244open in new window Finalize changelog command (@nylen)
                  • #1241open in new window Fix typo (@alexanderGugel)
                  • #1223open in new window Show latest version number instead of "upcoming" in changelog (@nylen)
                  • #1236open in new window Document how to use custom CA in README (#1229) (@hypesystem)
                  • #1228open in new window Support for oauth with RSA-SHA1 signing (@nylen)
                  • #1216open in new window Made json and multipart options coexist (@nylen, @simov)
                  • #1225open in new window Allow header white/exclusive lists in any case. (@RReverser)

                  # v2.47.0 (2014/10/26)

                  • #1222open in new window Move from mikeal/request to request/request (@nylen)
                  • #1220open in new window update qs dependency to 2.3.1 (@FredKSchott)
                  • #1212open in new window Improve tests/test-timeout.js (@nylen)
                  • #1219open in new window remove old globalAgent workaround for node 0.4 (@request)
                  • #1214open in new window Remove cruft left over from optional dependencies (@nylen)
                  • #1215open in new window Add proxyHeaderExclusiveList option for proxy-only headers. (@RReverser)
                  • #1211open in new window Allow 'Host' header instead of 'host' and remember case across redirects (@nylen)
                  • #1208open in new window Improve release script (@nylen)
                  • #1213open in new window Support for custom cookie store (@nylen, @mitsuru)
                  • #1197open in new window Clean up some code around setting the agent (@FredKSchott)
                  • #1209open in new window Improve multipart form append test (@simov)
                  • #1207open in new window Update changelog (@nylen)
                  • #1185open in new window Stream multipart/related bodies (@simov)

                  # v2.46.0 (2014/10/23)

                  • #1198open in new window doc for TLS/SSL protocol options (@shawnzhu)
                  • #1200open in new window Add a Gitter chat badge to README.mdopen in new window (@gitter-badger)
                  • #1196open in new window Upgrade taper test reporter to v0.3.0 (@nylen)
                  • #1199open in new window Fix lint error: undeclared var i (@nylen)
                  • #1191open in new window Move self.proxy decision logic out of init and into a helper (@FredKSchott)
                  • #1190open in new window Move _buildRequest() logic back into init (@FredKSchott)
                  • #1186open in new window Support Smarter Unix URL Scheme (@FredKSchott)
                  • #1178open in new window update form documentation for new usage (@FredKSchott)
                  • #1180open in new window Enable no-mixed-requires linting rule (@nylen)
                  • #1184open in new window Don't forward authorization header across redirects to different hosts (@nylen)
                  • #1183open in new window Correct README about pre and postamble CRLF using multipart and not mult... (@netpoetica)
                  • #1179open in new window Lint tests directory (@nylen)
                  • #1169open in new window add metadata for form-data file field (@dotcypress)
                  • #1173open in new window remove optional dependencies (@seanstrom)
                  • #1165open in new window Cleanup event listeners and remove function creation from init (@FredKSchott)
                  • #1174open in new window update the request.cookie docs to have a valid cookie example (@seanstrom)
                  • #1168open in new window create a detach helper and use detach helper in replace of nextTick (@seanstrom)
                  • #1171open in new window in post can send form data and use callback (@MiroRadenovic)
                  • #1159open in new window accept charset for x-www-form-urlencoded content-type (@seanstrom)
                  • #1157open in new window Update README.mdopen in new window: body with json=true (@Rob--W)
                  • #1164open in new window Disable tests/test-timeout.js on Travis (@nylen)
                  • #1153open in new window Document how to run a single test (@nylen)
                  • #1144open in new window adds documentation for the "response" event within the streaming section (@tbuchok)
                  • #1162open in new window Update eslintrc file to no longer allow past errors (@FredKSchott)
                  • #1155open in new window Support/use self everywhere (@seanstrom)
                  • #1161open in new window fix no-use-before-define lint warnings (@emkay)
                  • #1156open in new window adding curly brackets to get rid of lint errors (@emkay)
                  • #1151open in new window Fix localAddress test on OS X (@nylen)
                  • #1145open in new window documentation: fix outdated reference to setCookieSync old name in README (@FredKSchott)
                  • #1131open in new window Update pool documentation (@FredKSchott)
                  • #1143open in new window Rewrite all tests to use tape (@nylen)
                  • #1137open in new window Add ability to specifiy querystring lib in options. (@jgrund)
                  • #1138open in new window allow hostname and port in place of host on uri (@cappslock)
                  • #1134open in new window Fix multiple redirects and self.followRedirect (@blakeembrey)
                  • #1130open in new window documentation fix: add note about npm test for contributing (@FredKSchott)
                  • #1120open in new window Support/refactor request setup tunnel (@seanstrom)
                  • #1129open in new window linting fix: convert double quote strings to use single quotes (@FredKSchott)
                  • #1124open in new window linting fix: remove unneccesary semi-colons (@FredKSchott)

                  # v2.45.0 (2014/10/06)

                  • #1128open in new window Add test for setCookie regression (@nylen)
                  • #1127open in new window added tests around using objects as values in a query string (@bcoe)
                  • #1103open in new window Support/refactor request constructor (@nylen, @seanstrom)
                  • #1119open in new window add basic linting to request library (@FredKSchott)
                  • #1121open in new window Revert "Explicitly use sync versions of cookie functions" (@nylen)
                  • #1118open in new window linting fix: Restructure bad empty if statement (@FredKSchott)
                  • #1117open in new window Fix a bad check for valid URIs (@FredKSchott)
                  • #1113open in new window linting fix: space out operators (@FredKSchott)
                  • #1116open in new window Fix typo in noProxyHost definition (@FredKSchott)
                  • #1114open in new window linting fix: Added a new operator that was missing when creating and throwing a new error (@FredKSchott)
                  • #1096open in new window No_proxy support (@samcday)
                  • #1107open in new window linting-fix: remove unused variables (@FredKSchott)
                  • #1112open in new window linting fix: Make return values consistent and more straitforward (@FredKSchott)
                  • #1111open in new window linting fix: authPieces was getting redeclared (@FredKSchott)
                  • #1105open in new window Use strict mode in request (@FredKSchott)
                  • #1110open in new window linting fix: replace lazy '' with more strict '=' (@FredKSchott)
                  • #1109open in new window linting fix: remove function call from if-else conditional statement (@FredKSchott)
                  • #1102open in new window Fix to allow setting a requester on recursive calls to request.defaults (@tikotzky)
                  • #1095open in new window Tweaking engines in package.json (@pdehaan)
                  • #1082open in new window Forward the socket event from the httpModule request (@seanstrom)
                  • #972open in new window Clarify gzip handling in the README (@kevinoid)
                  • #1089open in new window Mention that encoding defaults to utf8, not Buffer (@stuartpb)
                  • #1088open in new window Fix cookie example in README.mdopen in new window and make it more clear (@pipi32167)
                  • #1027open in new window Add support for multipart form data in request options. (@crocket)
                  • #1076open in new window use Request.abort() to abort the request when the request has timed-out (@seanstrom)
                  • #1068open in new window add optional postamble required by .NET multipart requests (@netpoetica)

                  # v2.43.0 (2014/09/18)

                  • #1057open in new window Defaults should not overwrite defined options (@davidwood)
                  • #1046open in new window Propagate datastream errors, useful in case gzip fails. (@ZJONSSON, @Janpot)
                  • #1063open in new window copy the input headers object #1060 (@finnp)
                  • #1031open in new window Explicitly use sync versions of cookie functions (@ZJONSSON)
                  • #1056open in new window Fix redirects when passing url.parse(x) as URL to convenience method (@nylen)

                  # v2.42.0 (2014/09/04)

                  • #1053open in new window Fix #1051 Parse auth properly when using non-tunneling proxy (@isaacs)

                  # v2.41.0 (2014/09/04)

                  • #1050open in new window Pass whitelisted headers to tunneling proxy. Organize all tunneling logic. (@isaacs, @Feldhacker)
                  • #1035open in new window souped up nodei.coopen in new window badge (@rvagg)
                  • #1048open in new window Aws is now possible over a proxy (@steven-aerts)
                  • #1039open in new window extract out helper functions to a helper file (@seanstrom)
                  • #1021open in new window Support/refactor indexjs (@seanstrom)
                  • #1033open in new window Improve and document debug options (@nylen)
                  • #1034open in new window Fix readme headings (@nylen)
                  • #1030open in new window Allow recursive request.defaults (@tikotzky)
                  • #1029open in new window Fix a couple of typos (@nylen)
                  • #675open in new window Checking for SSL fault on connection before reading SSL properties (@VRMink)
                  • #989open in new window Added allowRedirect function. Should return true if redirect is allowed or false otherwise (@doronin)
                  • #1025open in new window [fixes #1023] Set self._ended to true once response has ended (@mridgway)
                  • #1020open in new window Add back removed debug metadata (@FredKSchott)
                  • #1008open in new window Moving to module instead of cutomer buffer concatenation. (@mikeal)
                  • #770open in new window Added dependency badge for README file; (@timgluz, @mafintosh, @lalitkapoor, @stash, @bobyrizov)
                  • #1016open in new window toJSON no longer results in an infinite loop, returns simple objects (@FredKSchott)
                  • #1018open in new window Remove pre-0.4.4 HTTPS fix (@mmalecki)
                  • #1006open in new window Migrate to caseless, fixes #1001 (@mikeal)
                  • #995open in new window Fix parsing array of objects (@sjonnet19)
                  • #999open in new window Fix fallback for browserify for optional modules. (@eiriksm)
                  • #996open in new window Wrong oauth signature when multiple same param keys exist [updated] (@bengl, @hyjin)

                  # v2.40.0 (2014/08/06)

                  • #992open in new window Fix security vulnerability. Update qs (@poeticninja)
                  • #988open in new window “--” -> “—” (@upisfree)
                  • #987open in new window Show optional modules as being loaded by the module that reqeusted them (@iarna)

                  # v2.39.0 (2014/07/24)

                  • #976open in new window Update README.mdopen in new window (@pvoznenko)

                  # v2.38.0 (2014/07/22)

                  • #952open in new window Adding support to client certificate with proxy use case (@ofirshaked)
                  • #884open in new window Documented tough-cookie installation. (@wbyoung)
                  • #935open in new window Correct repository url (@fritx)
                  • #963open in new window Update changelog (@nylen)
                  • #960open in new window Support gzip with encoding on node pre-v0.9.4 (@kevinoid)
                  • #953open in new window Add async Content-Length computation when using form-data (@LoicMahieu)
                  • #844open in new window Add support for HTTP[S]_PROXY environment variables. Fixes #595. (@jvmccarthy)
                  • #946open in new window defaults: merge headers (@aj0strow)

                  # v2.37.0 (2014/07/07)

                  • #957open in new window Silence EventEmitter memory leak warning #311 (@watson)
                  • #955open in new window check for content-length header before setting it in nextTick (@camilleanne)
                  • #951open in new window Add support for gzip content decoding (@kevinoid)
                  • #949open in new window Manually enter querystring in form option (@charlespwd)
                  • #944open in new window Make request work with browserify (@eiriksm)
                  • #943open in new window New mime module (@eiriksm)
                  • #927open in new window Bump version of hawk dep. (@samccone)
                  • #907open in new window append secureOptions to poolKey (@medovob)

                  # v2.35.0 (2014/05/17)

                  • #901open in new window Fixes #555 (@pigulla)
                  • #897open in new window merge with default options (@vohof)
                  • #891open in new window fixes 857 - options object is mutated by calling request (@lalitkapoor)
                  • #869open in new window Pipefilter test (@tgohn)
                  • #866open in new window Fix typo (@dandv)
                  • #861open in new window Add support for RFC 6750 Bearer Tokens (@phedny)
                  • #809open in new window upgrade tunnel-proxy to 0.4.0 (@ksato9700)
                  • #850open in new window Fix word consistency in readme (@0xNobody)
                  • #810open in new window add some exposition to mpu example in README.mdopen in new window (@mikermcneil)
                  • #840open in new window improve error reporting for invalid protocols (@FND)
                  • #821open in new window added secureOptions back (@nw)
                  • #815open in new window Create changelog based on pull requests (@lalitkapoor)

                  # v2.34.0 (2014/02/18)

                  • #516open in new window UNIX Socket URL Support (@lyuzashi)
                  • #801open in new window 794 ignore cookie parsing and domain errors (@lalitkapoor)
                  • #802open in new window Added the Apache license to the package.json. (@keskival)
                  • #793open in new window Adds content-length calculation when submitting forms using form-data li... (@Juul)
                  • #785open in new window Provide ability to override content-type when json option used (@vvo)
                  • #781open in new window simpler isReadStream function (@joaojeronimo)

                  # v2.32.0 (2014/01/16)

                  • #767open in new window Use tough-cookie CookieJar sync API (@stash)
                  • #764open in new window Case-insensitive authentication scheme (@bobyrizov)
                  • #763open in new window Upgrade tough-cookie to 0.10.0 (@stash)
                  • #744open in new window Use Cookie.parse (@lalitkapoor)
                  • #757open in new window require aws-sign2 (@mafintosh)

                  # v2.31.0 (2014/01/08)

                  • #645open in new window update twitter api url to v1.1 (@mick)
                  • #746open in new window README: Markdown code highlight (@weakish)
                  • #745open in new window updating setCookie example to make it clear that the callback is required (@emkay)
                  • #742open in new window Add note about JSON output body type (@iansltx)
                  • #741open in new window README example is using old cookie jar api (@emkay)
                  • #736open in new window Fix callback arguments documentation (@mmalecki)

                  # v2.30.0 (2013/12/13)

                  • #732open in new window JSHINT: Creating global 'for' variable. Should be 'for (var ...'. (@Fritz-Lium)
                  • #730open in new window better HTTP DIGEST support (@dai-shi)
                  • #728open in new window Fix TypeError when calling request.cookie (@scarletmeow)

                  # v2.29.0 (2013/12/06)

                  • #727open in new window fix requester bug (@jchris)

                  # v2.28.0 (2013/12/04)

                  • #724open in new window README.mdopen in new window: add custom HTTP Headers example. (@tcort)
                  • #719open in new window Made a comment gender neutral. (@unsetbit)
                  • #715open in new window Request.multipart no longer crashes when header 'Content-type' present (@pastaclub)
                  • #710open in new window Fixing listing in callback part of docs. (@lukasz-zak)
                  • #696open in new window Edited README.mdopen in new window for formatting and clarity of phrasing (@Zearin)
                  • #694open in new window Typo in README (@VRMink)
                  • #690open in new window Handle blank password in basic auth. (@diversario)
                  • #682open in new window Optional dependencies (@Turbo87)
                  • #683open in new window Travis CI support (@Turbo87)
                  • #674open in new window change cookie module,to tough-cookie.please check it . (@sxyizhiren)
                  • #666open in new window make ciphers and secureProtocol to work in https request (@richarddong)
                  • #656open in new window Test case for #304. (@diversario)
                  • #662open in new window option.tunnel to explicitly disable tunneling (@seanmonstar)
                  • #659open in new window fix failure when running with NODE_DEBUG=request, and a test for that (@jrgm)
                  • #630open in new window Send random cnonce for HTTP Digest requests (@wprl)

                  # v2.27.0 (2013/08/15)

                  • #619open in new window decouple things a bit (@joaojeronimo)

                  # v2.26.0 (2013/08/07)

                  • #613open in new window Fixes #583, moved initialization of self.uri.pathname (@lexander)
                  • #605open in new window Only include ":" + pass in Basic Auth if it's defined (fixes #602) (@bendrucker)

                  # v2.24.0 (2013/07/23)

                  • #596open in new window Global agent is being used when pool is specified (@Cauldrath)
                  • #594open in new window Emit complete event when there is no callback (@RomainLK)
                  • #601open in new window Fixed a small typo (@michalstanko)

                  # v2.23.0 (2013/07/23)

                  • #589open in new window Prevent setting headers after they are sent (@geek)
                  • #587open in new window Global cookie jar disabled by default (@threepointone)

                  # v2.22.0 (2013/07/05)

                  • #544open in new window Update http-signature version. (@davidlehn)
                  • #581open in new window Fix spelling of "ignoring." (@bigeasy)
                  • #568open in new window use agentOptions to create agent when specified in request (@SamPlacette)
                  • #564open in new window Fix redirections (@criloz)
                  • #541open in new window The exported request function doesn't have an auth method (@tschaub)
                  • #542open in new window Expose Request class (@regality)

                  # v2.21.0 (2013/04/30)

                  • #536open in new window Allow explicitly empty user field for basic authentication. (@mikeando)
                  • #532open in new window fix typo (@fredericosilva)
                  • #497open in new window Added redirect event (@Cauldrath)
                  • #503open in new window Fix basic auth for passwords that contain colons (@tonistiigi)
                  • #521open in new window Improving test-localAddress.js (@noway421)
                  • #529open in new window dependencies versions bump (@jodaka)

                  # v2.18.0 (2013/04/22)

                  • #523open in new window Updating dependencies (@noway421)
                  • #520open in new window Fixing test-tunnel.js (@noway421)
                  • #519open in new window Update internal path state on post-creation QS changes (@jblebrun)
                  • #510open in new window Add HTTP Signature support. (@davidlehn)
                  • #502open in new window Fix POST (and probably other) requests that are retried after 401 Unauthorized (@nylen)
                  • #508open in new window Honor the .strictSSL option when using proxies (tunnel-agent) (@jhs)
                  • #512open in new window Make password optional to support the format: http://username@hostname/open in new window (@pajato1)
                  • #513open in new window add 'localAddress' support (@yyfrankyy)
                  • #498open in new window Moving response emit above setHeaders on destination streams (@kenperkins)
                  • #490open in new window Empty response body (3-rd argument) must be passed to callback as an empty string (@Olegas)
                  • #479open in new window Changing so if Accept header is explicitly set, sending json does not ov... (@RoryH)
                  • #475open in new window Use unescape from querystring (@shimaore)
                  • #473open in new window V0.10 compat (@isaacs)
                  • #471open in new window Using querystring library from visionmedia (@kbackowski)
                  • #461open in new window Strip the UTF8 BOM from a UTF encoded response (@kppullin)
                  • #460open in new window hawk 0.10.0 (@hueniverse)
                  • #462open in new window if query params are empty, then request path shouldn't end with a '?' (merges cleanly now) (@jaipandya)
                  • #456open in new window hawk 0.9.0 (@hueniverse)
                  • #429open in new window Copy options before adding callback. (@nrn, @nfriedly, @youurayy, @jplock, @kapetan, @landeiro, @othiym23, @mmalecki)
                  • #454open in new window Destroy the response if present when destroying the request (clean merge) (@mafintosh)
                  • #310open in new window Twitter Oauth Stuff Out of Date; Now Updated (@joemccann, @isaacs, @mscdex)
                  • #413open in new window rename googledoodle.png to .jpg (@nfriedly, @youurayy, @jplock, @kapetan, @landeiro, @othiym23, @mmalecki)
                  • #448open in new window Convenience method for PATCH (@mloar)
                  • #444open in new window protect against double callbacks on error path (@spollack)
                  • #433open in new window Added support for HTTPS cert & key (@mmalecki)
                  • #430open in new window Respect specified {Host,host} headers, not just {host} (@andrewschaaf)
                  • #415open in new window Fixed a typo. (@jerem)
                  • #338open in new window Add more auth options, including digest support (@nylen)
                  • #403open in new window Optimize environment lookup to happen once only (@mmalecki)
                  • #398open in new window Add more reporting to tests (@mmalecki)
                  • #388open in new window Ensure "safe" toJSON doesn't break EventEmitters (@othiym23)
                  • #381open in new window Resolving "Invalid signature. Expected signature base string: " (@landeiro)
                  • #380open in new window Fixes missing host header on retried request when using forever agent (@mac-)
                  • #376open in new window Headers lost on redirect (@kapetan)
                  • #375open in new window Fix for missing oauth_timestamp parameter (@jplock)
                  • #374open in new window Correct Host header for proxy tunnel CONNECT (@youurayy)
                  • #370open in new window Twitter reverse auth uses x_auth_mode not x_auth_type (@drudge)
                  • #369open in new window Don't remove x_auth_mode for Twitter reverse auth (@drudge)
                  • #344open in new window Make AWS auth signing find headers correctly (@nlf)
                  • #363open in new window rfc3986 on base_uri, now passes tests (@jeffmarshall)
                  • #362open in new window Running rfc3986 on base_uri in oauth.hmacsign instead of just encodeURIComponent (@jeffmarshall)
                  • #361open in new window Don't create a Content-Length header if we already have it set (@danjenkins)
                  • #360open in new window Delete self._form along with everything else on redirect (@jgautier)
                  • #355open in new window stop sending erroneous headers on redirected requests (@azylman)
                  • #332open in new window Fix #296 - Only set Content-Type if body exists (@Marsup)
                  • #343open in new window Allow AWS to work in more situations, added a note in the README on its usage (@nlf)
                  • #320open in new window request.defaults() doesn't need to wrap jar() (@StuartHarris)
                  • #322open in new window Fix + test for piped into request bumped into redirect. #321 (@alexindigo)
                  • #326open in new window Do not try to remove listener from an undefined connection (@strk)
                  • #318open in new window Pass servername to tunneling secure socket creation (@isaacs)
                  • #317open in new window Workaround for #313 (@isaacs)
                  • #293open in new window Allow parser errors to bubble up to request (@mscdex)
                  • #290open in new window A test for #289 (@isaacs)
                  • #280open in new window Like in node.js print options if NODE_DEBUG contains the word request (@Filirom1)
                  • #207open in new window Fix #206 Change HTTP/HTTPS agent when redirecting between protocols (@isaacs)
                  • #214open in new window documenting additional behavior of json option (@jphaas)
                  • #272open in new window Boundary begins with CRLF? (@elspoono, @timshadel, @naholyr, @nanodocumet, @TehShrike)
                  • #284open in new window Remove stray console.log() call in multipart generator. (@bcherry)
                  • #241open in new window Composability updates suggested by issue #239 (@polotek)
                  • #282open in new window OAuth Authorization header contains non-"oauth_" parameters (@jplock)
                  • #279open in new window fix tests with boundary by injecting boundry from header (@benatkin)
                  • #273open in new window Pipe back pressure issue (@mafintosh)
                  • #268open in new window I'm not OCD seriously (@TehShrike)
                  • #263open in new window Bug in OAuth key generation for sha1 (@nanodocumet)
                  • #265open in new window uncaughtException when redirected to invalid URI (@naholyr)
                  • #262open in new window JSON test should check for equality (@timshadel)
                  • #261open in new window Setting 'pool' to 'false' does NOT disable Agent pooling (@timshadel)
                  • #249open in new window Fix for the fix of your (closed) issue #89 where self.headers[content-length] is set to 0 for all methods (@sethbridges, @polotek, @zephrax, @jeromegn)
                  • #255open in new window multipart allow body === '' ( the empty string ) (@Filirom1)
                  • #260open in new window fixed just another leak of 'i' (@sreuter)
                  • #246open in new window Fixing the set-cookie header (@jeromegn)
                  • #243open in new window Dynamic boundary (@zephrax)
                  • #240open in new window don't error when null is passed for options (@polotek)
                  • #211open in new window Replace all occurrences of special chars in RFC3986 (@chriso)
                  • #224open in new window Multipart content-type change (@janjongboom)
                  • #217open in new window need to use Authorization (titlecase) header with Tumblr OAuth (@visnup)
                  • #203open in new window Fix cookie and redirect bugs and add auth support for HTTPS tunnel (@milewise)
                  • #199open in new window Tunnel (@isaacs)
                  • #198open in new window Bugfix on forever usage of util.inherits (@isaacs)
                  • #197open in new window Make ForeverAgent work with HTTPS (@isaacs)
                  • #193open in new window Fixes GH-119 (@goatslacker)
                  • #188open in new window Add abort support to the returned request (@itay)
                  • #176open in new window Querystring option (@csainty)
                  • #182open in new window Fix request.defaults to support (uri, options, callback) api (@twilson63)
                  • #180open in new window Modified the post, put, head and del shortcuts to support uri optional param (@twilson63)
                  • #179open in new window fix to add opts in .pipe(stream, opts) (@substack)
                  • #177open in new window Issue #173 Support uri as first and optional config as second argument (@twilson63)
                  • #170open in new window can't create a cookie in a wrapped request (defaults) (@fabianonunes)
                  • #168open in new window Picking off an EasyFix by adding some missing mimetypes. (@serby)
                  • #161open in new window Fix cookie jar/headers.cookie collision (#125) (@papandreou)
                  • #162open in new window Fix issue #159 (@dpetukhov)
                  • #90open in new window add option followAllRedirects to follow post/put redirects (@jroes)
                  • #148open in new window Retry Agent (@thejh)
                  • #146open in new window Multipart should respect content-type if previously set (@apeace)
                  • #144open in new window added "form" option to readme (@petejkim)
                  • #133open in new window Fixed cookies parsing (@afanasy)
                  • #135open in new window host vs hostname (@iangreenleaf)
                  • #132open in new window return the body as a Buffer when encoding is set to null (@jahewson)
                  • #112open in new window Support using a custom http-like module (@jhs)
                  • #104open in new window Cookie handling contains bugs (@janjongboom)
                  • #121open in new window Another patch for cookie handling regression (@jhurliman)
                  • #117open in new window Remove the global i (@3rd-Eden)
                  • #110open in new window Update to Iris Couch URL (@jhs)
                  • #86open in new window Can't post binary to multipart requests (@kkaefer)
                  • #105open in new window added test for proxy option. (@dominictarr)
                  • #102open in new window Implemented cookies - closes issue 82: https://github.com/mikeal/request/issues/82open in new window (@alessioalex)
                  • #97open in new window Typo in previous pull causes TypeError in non-0.5.11 versions (@isaacs)
                  • #96open in new window Authless parsed url host support (@isaacs)
                  • #81open in new window Enhance redirect handling (@danmactough)
                  • #78open in new window Don't try to do strictSSL for non-ssl connections (@isaacs)
                  • #76open in new window Bug when a request fails and a timeout is set (@Marsup)
                  • #70open in new window add test script to package.json (@isaacs, @aheckmann)
                  • #73open in new window Fix #71 Respect the strictSSL flag (@isaacs)
                  • #69open in new window Flatten chunked requests properly (@isaacs)
                  • #67open in new window fixed global variable leaks (@aheckmann)
                  • #66open in new window Do not overwrite established content-type headers for read stream deliver (@voodootikigod)
                  • #53open in new window Parse json: Issue #51 (@benatkin)
                  • #45open in new window Added timeout option (@mbrevoort)
                  • #35open in new window The "end" event isn't emitted for some responses (@voxpelli)
                  • #31open in new window Error on piping a request to a destination (@tobowers)
